formal_query_policy.query_id_order: 009 rows become q_001..q_020; 010 rows become q_021..q_040

runtime_candidate_policy.coarse_retrieval: DINOv2 query features searched against the reused fixed satellite FAISS index
runtime_candidate_policy.rerank: RoMa v2 inlier_count_only over DINOv2 Top-20
runtime_candidate_policy.truth_usage: query truth CSVs are passed to RoMa/evaluation scripts only for labels, summaries, and reports; they are not used to construct runtime FAISS candidates
runtime_candidate_policy.pose_score_source: RoMa reranked fused_score exported as build_formal_candidate_manifest score
